tweets.text:
Under the leadership of @POTUS Trump and @SecMullinDHS, we are working every day to keep our communities safe. 

Over the weekend, the heroic men and women of ICE arrested criminal illegal aliens convicted for some of the worst crimes imaginable, including sex trafficking, child rape, and kidnapping:
